subcodes.first_line: The Herald hath proclaimed: "This is the Day of the Promised One! The Kingdom belongeth to the Creator of existence. Men have drawn nigh unto the celestial realm." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نادی المناد هذا یوم المیعاد الملک لمالک الایجاد قد اقبل الی الملکوت رجال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
